summary: Demo dry-run probe (slice 6, 2026-05-07): BA-shaped 'research synthesis' workflow — exercises web_scrape + llm with consolidation prompt. Tests whether the composer handles a more directive multi-source research prompt similar to what the operator might give live during the SES/CEO demo. NOT scored against a strict criteria — purpose is observation, not measurement.
opening_prompt:
Build me a workflow that scrapes these three Wikipedia articles and runs each one through an LLM with a 4-sentence executive briefing prompt. Save all four briefings (one per source) to outputs/briefings.jsonl. URLs (CSV with column 'url'):
url
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solar_power
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wind_power
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hydropower

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight.
